display_name:
State-of-the-art image generation with four times the resolution of standard FLUX-1.1-pro. Best-in-class prompt adherence and pixel-perfect image detail. 

Optional parameters:
Select an aspect ratio.
description:
State-of-the-art image generation with four times the resolution of standard FLUX-1.1-pro. Best-in-class prompt adherence and pixel-perfect image detail. 

Optional parameters:
Select an aspect ratio. Valid aspect ratios are 21:9, 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16, & 9:21. 
Raw detail (no other arguments needed) for an overall less processed, everyday aesthetic. 
Redux image adherence. Image Adherence strength for Redux/Restyle.

Notes: Send  an image to have this model reimagine/regenerate it via FLUX Redux
